definitions: Do not risk everything on a single venture or opportunity.
Diversify your efforts or investments to avoid losing everything if one thing fails.
examples: When investing, it's wise not to put all your eggs in one basket.
She decided to apply to several colleges, not putting all her eggs in one basket.
For job searching, don't put all your eggs in one basket; apply to many places.
lemma: not put all your eggs in one basket
source: don't put all your eggs in one basket
